characters.name: 'Dutch' Dylan
characters.description: 'Dutch' Dylan 'Dutch' Dylanis thedream personaofBarry Dylan, inSeason 8: Dreamland. He is the hired henchman ofLen Trexler'sdream persona and, once again, Archer's nemesis. He appears as a trenchcoat-wearing henchman, before being transformed into a denim-clad cyborg (legs and arms only) which he acquires from a biker.  Oh, and a floppy hat.

characters.name: Abelard
characters.description: AbelardFirst appearanceMole Hunt  Abelardis the name of a pug owned by aflight attendant, one ofArcher'svarious sexual partners.

characters.name: Abelard
characters.description: AbelardFirst appearanceMole Hunt  Abelardis the name of a pug owned by aflight attendant, one ofArcher'svarious sexual partners.

characters.name: Alligator
characters.description: The alligator attacks the airboat. AlligatorsareArcher'sbiggest fear. During the events of "Pipeline Fever", Archer attempts fishing with a bow and arrow. Instead of shooting a fish, he accidentally shoots an alligator in the head. This enrages the gator and it attacks Archer and Lana aboard theairboat. As Archer attempts to shoot the gator, he misses and ends up shooting a hole in the deck of the Airboat. Sterling Archer tracks information on gator attacks in the U.S. however he can not find any information on attacks in China.

characters.name: Annie
characters.description: Annie, resting in peace. Anniewas one ofRemy's two Redbone Coonhounds. She died in her sleep around the time thatArcherandLanacommandeered Remy'sairboat. Remy's other dog, Old Dan, is buried in a plot in the Louisiana marshland.

characters.name: Archer's Father
characters.description: Archer's FatherFirst appearance"Once Bitten"Voiced byPeter SerafinowiczInformationStatusUnknownAge62Height6'2" (estimated)WeightUnknownEyesUnknownHairUnknownAliasesJohn Fitzgerald ArcherNikolai JakovLen TrexlerBuddy RichLanguagesEnglish (native)AffiliationsNationalityAmericanOccupationUnknownSkillsUnknownPersonal LifeFamilySterling Archer(biological son)Abbiejean Kane-Archer(Granddaughter)RelationshipsMalory Archer(sexual partner)Sterling Archer(biological son)Abbiejean Kane-Archer(Granddaughter)Malory Archer(sexual partner)  A continuing mystery on the show is the identity ofSterling Archer's real father. Whoever provides the voice of Archer's real father is unknown. Not much is known about Archer's father as he hasn't yet been fully introduced. From what has been shown, is that he appears to have cared for his son as he was considerate enough to visit him and give him a stuffed animal as a birthday present. Archer's father may have some unexplained reason for not being in his son's life to raise him.

characters.name: Malory Archer
characters.description: Malory ArcherFirst appearance"Mole Hunt"Voiced byJessica WalterInformationAgeAge 64 (August 22, 1956)Height5'8"EyesBlueHairBlack (Grey with age)LanguagesEnglish (native)GermanItalian (fluent)FrenchAffiliationsNationalityAmericanOccupationHead ofISIS(Retired)Personal LifeFamilySterling Archer(son)Bub(mother)Abbiejean Kane-Archer(granddaughter)Unknown sisterBrian (nephew)Unnamed auntRelationshipsNikolai Jakov(ex-boyfriend)Len Trexler(ex-boyfriend)Trudy Beekman(rival)Buddy Rich(ex-boyfriend)Burt Reynolds(ex-boyfriend)Cornelius Varma(ex-lover)Ron Cadillac(Husband)Sterling Archer(son)Bub(mother)Abbiejean Kane-Archer(granddaughter)Unknown sisterBrian (nephew)Unnamed auntNikolai Jakov(ex-boyfriend)Len Trexler(ex-boyfriend)Trudy Beekman(rival)Buddy Rich(ex-boyfriend)Burt Reynolds(ex-boyfriend)Cornelius Varma(ex-lover)Ron Cadillac(Husband)  Malory Archerwas the tritagonist of the show. She was the former Chief Executive Officer ofISISand the mother ofSterling Archer. Tough, ruthless and the veteran of many dangerous missions, Malory will do whatever it takes to succeed. She'll sacrifice others, lie, cheat and even harm herself. She is extremely secretive, vindictive, crafty and patient - not a woman one trifles with or crosses. Her description of her son in "Jeu Monegasque" as a "vain, selfish, lying, and quite possibly alcoholic man-whore" works equally well for her. She is politically conservative, proudly elitist, and casually but inconsistently racist (in the episode "The Limited" she calls a black conductorGeorge, which turned out to be his real name, which she didn't know before). She also harbors prejudice towards Irish people as well as bitterness towards the Japanese and Germans for World War II. She is also very amoral. In "Skytanic", she went to extreme lengths to fake a bomb threat in order to get a room on the rigid airship, simply because her neighbor/rival,Trudy Beekman, was bragging about her suite. As it turned out there was in fact a bomb on board. After she couldn't book a reservation at restaurant "16", she faked another emergency in "Live and Let Dine"; this time she set up a threat against the life of the ambassador of Albania, but again, this too came to fruition (the chef poisoned the Ambassador). She is an excessive drinker bordering on alcoholism, near-constantly having a drink in hand or looking for any liquids of alcoholic content to consume. She was absent most of Sterling's life, most notably lettingWoodhouseraise him for the first five years of his life (until she decided to suddenly show up out of the woodwork, bringing with her gifts for him to buy back his love). Malory's raising (or lack thereof) is directly responsible for Archer's many neuroses and behaviors. Malory would simultaneously neglect, berate & dismiss Archer at every turn, while also spoiling him rotten & bailing him out at every opportunity. Pam even notes that her 3 favorite things are "Money, Archer, and Booze". Despite that Malory never hesitates to call

characters.name: Sterling Archer
characters.description: "Introspection is the enemy of happiness." --Princeton Sterling ArcherSterling Malory ArcherAdultTeenageChildFirst appearance"Mole Hunt"Voiced byH. Jon BenjaminModelJason FitzgeraldInformationStatusAliveAgeDecember 30, 1978 (Age 42)Height6'2" (1.88m)Weight184 LBS (83kg)EyesBlueHairBlackAliasesDuchess (officialISIScode name)Darling (byKatya Kazanova)SlutChet ManleyCyril FiggisRandoRandyRandy MagnumRandy RandersonRandy RandlemanLando Calrissiano(byCyril Figgis)Pirate KingBob BelcherLickbagDickbagButler the ButlerTennessee TuxedoMancy DrewFreaky BigtimeSleeping Beauty (by A.J.)Migs (byLana Kane)LanguagesEnglish (native)Russian (advanced)Finnish (conversational)Spanish (conversational)Thai (conversational)Yiddish (conversational)French (fair)American Sign Language (fair)Romanian (novice)Arabic (novice)Italian (novice)Portuguese (novice)Romansh (novice)Japanese (comprehension)Urdu (one phrase)AffiliationsNationalityAmericanOccupationIIAagent,Figgis Agencyinvestigator/agent (formerly),ISISagent/Drug Smuggler/Bartender/Chef/Private investigator (formerly)SkillsMelee weapons, firearms, honeypot, scuba, lacrosse, hand-to-hand combat, infiltration, undercover (allegedly), archery, drink mixing/knowledge, escape car driving, asset acquisition, some explosivesPersonal LifeFamilyBub(grandmother)Malory Archer(mother)SeveralPossible Fathers:・Nikolai Jakov・Len Trexler・Buddy Rich・Unnamed Italian RebelSeamus McGoon(legal son)Abbiejean Kane-Archer(daughter)Brian (cousin)Ron Cadillac(stepfather)Unnamed auntRelationshipsLana Kane(child's mother/love interest)Woodhouse(caretaker)Katya Kazanova(late/ex-fiancée)TwittercodenameduchessBub(grandmother)Malory Archer(mother)SeveralPossible Fathers:・Nikolai Jakov・Len Trexler・Buddy Rich・Unnamed Italian RebelSeamus McGoon(legal son)Abbiejean Kane-Archer(daughter)Brian (cousin)Ron Cadillac(stepfather)Unnamed auntLana Kane(child's mother/love interest)Woodhouse(caretaker)Katya Kazanova(late/ex-fiancée)codenameduchess  Archer is an extremely narcissistic, arrogant, selfish, insensitive, self-absorbed, and sex-crazed man who is constantly focused on himself and his own needs and desires. He arrogantly believes himself to understand any situation better than his colleagues. Thus, Archer selfishly refuses to admit when he is proven wrong and will go to extreme lengths to cover up his mistakes, particularly when they may incurhis mother's scorn. He can also be very hypocritical, and any actions that seem to help others are almost certainly for his own benefit., and is often willing to put his allies in danger. He is also often misogynistic, though he occasionally espouses progressive attitudes if it means showing superiority over others, is superficial and materialistic, often to the point of amorality, refusing to accept anything less than the finest option available, and regularly spends others' money on completely unnecessary luxuries. He is suave and debonair when it suits him but often drops this veneer quickly once he has gotten
characters.personality_section: Archer is an extremely narcissistic, arrogant, selfish, insensitive, self-absorbed, and sex-crazed man who is constantly focused on himself and his own needs and desires. He arrogantly believes himself to understand any situation better than his colleagues. Thus, Archer selfishly refuses to admit when he is proven wrong and will go to extreme lengths to cover up his mistakes, particularly when they may incurhis mother's scorn. He can also be very hypocritical, and any actions that seem to help others are almost certainly for his own benefit., and is often willing to put his allies in danger. He is also often misogynistic, though he occasionally espouses progressive attitudes if it means showing superiority over others, is superficial and materialistic, often to the point of amorality, refusing to accept anything less than the finest option available, and regularly spends others' money on completely unnecessary luxuries. He is suave and debonair when it suits him but often drops this veneer quickly once he has gotten what he wants. Like his mother, he is a high-functioning alcoholic, often requiring alcohol to perform at maximum efficiency. His juvenile sense of humor includes shouting "phrasing" (which he learned fromMcGinley) whenever a statement has any sexual double entendre, making snide, disparaging remarks at his co-workers on a daily basis and using his encyclopedic knowledge of trivia to make crude comments. Despite his high opinion of himself, he has also shown hints

characters.name: Farooq Ashkani
characters.description: Farooq AshkaniFirst appearanceSittingVoiced byKumail NanjianiInformationAgeUnknownEyesBrownHairBlackPersonal LifeFamilyUnnamed CousinUnnamed Cousin Farooq Ashkaniis an actor with a talent for improv performance. He first appeared in "Sitting" posing as a Pakistani cyberspy who kidnaps babyAJto forceArcherto take him to theISIS mainframe. Archer's plans for a relaxing night watching AJ are interrupted when Farooq bursts intothe apartmentwith a shoulder-shot AgentSlater. Slater introduces Farooq as a cyberspy working for Pakistani Intelligence looking to defect to America. On the way to a CIA safehouse, the duo are ambushed by Pakistani agents and flee to Archer's place. Promising to pay Archer, Slater leaves Farooq with Archer while he goes to hunt down the mole who leaked the safehouse's location to the agents. Farooq is depicted as easy-going, though slightly naïve. He, at first, believes Archer's statistic about accidents in the home, misses the double entendre he created with the word "strapped," and fails to realize the pun in his acting troupe's name (Dream the Improv-able Dream) until Cyril points it out to him. He is bilingual and a pretty good shot. Farooq is passionate about his improv, but his skills (at best) range only from mediocre to good. While great at coming up with a backstory and staying in character, his ability to perform spontaneously needs a little work. On the spot, he comes up with the dubious name and job of "Manny the manny." Furthermore, he reveals his plan to Archer which, as the spy points out, would've given the CIA the opportunity to simply find the spyware. Still, he's talented enough to fool Archer and stay fully committed throughout the evening. His passion for his craft is also shown to lead to him making extremely questionable decisions, such as using an actual gun as part of his act, leading to Archer getting hit while also putting the others in the building at risk.

characters.name: Babou
characters.description: BabouFirst appearanceEl SecuestroInformationHairBrown, white & black spotsAliasesBuyer's Remorse, Fox-eared assholePersonal LifeRelationshipsCheryl Tunt(Owner)Cheryl Tunt(Owner) Babouis the name ofCheryl Tunt’s pet ocelot. Cheryl feels buyer's remorse for purchasing Babou, due to his frequent sickness and medical expenses. She has shown up late for work on multiple occasions, due to tending to him. At the time, everyone thought Cheryl was lying because ocelots are a rare and expensive pet, and they were unaware of her wealth.[1]

characters.description: BabouFirst appearanceEl SecuestroInformationHairBrown, white & black spotsAliasesBuyer's Remorse, Fox-eared assholePersonal LifeRelationshipsCheryl Tunt(Owner)Cheryl Tunt(Owner) Babouis the name ofCheryl Tunt’s pet ocelot. Cheryl feels buyer's remorse for purchasing Babou, due to his frequent sickness and medical expenses. She has shown up late for work on multiple occasions, due to tending to him. At the time, everyone thought Cheryl was lying because ocelots are a rare and expensive pet, and they were unaware of her wealth.[1]

characters.name: Barry 6
characters.description: Barry 6First appearanceBort the GarjVoiced byDave WillisInformationStatusDestroyedLanguagesEnglishAffiliationsSkillsExtortion Barry 6is a robotic villain inSeason 10: Archer 1999. He is thedream personaofBarry Dylan. Much the same as his reality persona, Barry is irreverent while deadly. Much the same as his reality persona, Barry is irreverent while deadly.

characters.name: Trudy Beekman
characters.description: Trudy BeekmanFirst appearance"The Honeymooners"Voiced byUnknownInformationLanguagesEnglishAffiliationsNationalityAmericanOccupationSocialite  Trudy BeekmanisMalory Archer's neighbor and social rival. Malory is often finding ways to establish herself above Trudy, in "Skytanic" going so far as to call in a phony bomb threat to the rigid airship,Excelsior. She made the threat so she could bump Trudy off the guest list and take the trip herself. When told she had been bumped, Trudy got so mad she vomited in anger.

characters.name: Doctor Ben
characters.description: Doctor BenFirst appearanceBlood TestAffiliationsOccupationODINDoctor  Doctor Ben, is the doctorBarry DylanandODINused to take a liter of blood fromArcherfor the paternity test to determine the father ofSeamus. He also oversaw the paternity test.

characters.name: Benoit
characters.description: BenoitFirst appearance"Jeu Monégasque"Voiced byPeter SerafinowiczInformationHairBlackAliasesBenoit BallsLanguagesFrench (native)English (fluent)AffiliationsNationalityMonégasqueOccupationHotel Concierge  Benoitwas a concierge at the hotel whereMalory Archer,Sterling Archer,Lana Kane, andRay Gillettewere staying during a mission to recover a disk of data fromLe Chuffre. He tried to steal the combined 401k's of everyISISagent, only to be killed in an ensuing fight between him, Archer, Lana, and Ray.

characters.name: Bilbo
characters.description: BilboFirst appearance"Mole Hunt"Voiced byAdam ReedInformationHairBlondeAliasesCount SnackulaLanguagesEnglish (native)AffiliationsOccupationISISSupportSkillsSatellites, computers, other technical support,The Lord of The Ringsknowledge  Bilboworked with the computers and satellites atISIS, as well as other technical support. He was a Tolkien enthusiast and had an exact double working at ISIS (as seen in the first episode, "Mole Hunt"). His voice is provided by series creatorAdam Reedin most of the episodes he appears in, although he was voiced by a different actor in the first one where he has lines, "Diversity Hire".

characters.name: Corporal Bishop
characters.description: Corporal BishopFirst appearanceThe Double DeuceInformationEyesHazelHairWhiteAliasesStinkyLanguagesEnglish (native)AffiliationsNationalityEnglishSkillsRFC memberPersonal LifeFamilyUnnamed NieceUnnamed Niece  Corporal Bishop, also known asStinky, served in World War I and was in the same squadron asWoodhouse. After the mysterious deaths of many members of their old squadron, Stinky reconnected with Woodhouse. They both suspected LieutenantScripesof murdering their squad mates in order to win the Tontine. Stinky then joined forces with Woodhouse, attempting to fortifySterling Archer's apartment in New York against an attack by Scripes.

After the mysterious deaths of many members of their old squadron, Stinky reconnected with Woodhouse. They both suspected LieutenantScripesof murdering their squad mates in order to win the Tontine. Stinky then joined forces with Woodhouse, attempting to fortifySterling Archer's apartment in New York against an attack by Scripes.

characters.name: Bob Belcher
characters.description: Bob Belcher (Left) andArcher(Right) as Bob Belcher Bob Belcher is the titular character from FOX's TV showBob's Burgers.Episode 1ofseason 4, is a crossover episode in whichArcherappears in a burger joint flipping burgers. He is married to a woman namedLinda Belcherand the father of 3 kids who are the Belcher family of Bob's Burgers. Archer has forgotten who he is and has now assumed the identity of Bob.

characters.name: Boingo
characters.description: BoingoFirst appearance"Bel Panto: Part I"Voiced byUnknownInformationStatusAliveEyesBrownHairBlue (mask)AliasesBoingoLanguagesEnglish (native)AffiliationsNationalityAmericanOccupationRobberPersonal LifeRelationshipsAlan Shapiro(hirer)Mr. Rompers(superior)Oingo(comrade)Nurple(comrade)Giggles(comrade)Pinky Brewster(comrade)Yum Yum(comrade)Alan Shapiro(hirer)Mr. Rompers(superior)Oingo(comrade)Nurple(comrade)Giggles(comrade)Pinky Brewster(comrade)Yum Yum(comrade)  Boingois the alias of one of the clowns that attacked a fundraiser atEllis Crane'smansion. He is one of the 6 out of 7 members of Romper's crew whose codename began with the letter of the color they were wearing. He may be the closest person to Romper as he was the only one seen standing alone side by side with him. He is one of the members who escaped the authorities alongside Romper, Oingo, and Nurple.

characters.name: Bort
characters.description: Bortis an alien life form from the planetGarj. He's the heir to a large family fortune. His species has no arms and can pass through solid objects. He is voiced bySam Richardson.

characters.name: Brett Bunsen
characters.description: Brett BunsenFirst appearance"Mole Hunt"Voiced byNeal HolmanInformationAge(September 9, Age 40’s) (Deceased)AliasesMr. Bloodmobile, Brett BuckleyLanguagesEnglish (native)AffiliationsNationalityAmericanOccupationISISEmployeeSkillsGetting shot  Brett Bunsenwas anISISemployee who got shot numerous times while employed there. He is voiced by and physically modeled onNeal Holman, the production designer and art director ofArcher.[1] Brett appears to have a case of PTSD for which Archer is a trigger. This is evident due to the fact that whenever Brett comes into contact with Archer, he jumps and screams.
